sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20856" key="braxuki/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχῠ-κίνητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n20856.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accompanied by slight motion</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐνέργεια</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0530.tlg006:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Gaur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
